summary: Completed comprehensive testing of esfiharia digital menu system. All major features tested successfully including menu browsing, cart management, order processing, kitchen workflow, and cashier operations.
passed_tests: Products retrieval with all categories (esfihas, bebidas, sobremesas)
Order creation with customer details and items
Order status updates (pending → preparing → ready → delivered)
Menu page loads with products by category
Cart page displays items with quantity controls (+/-)
Kitchen page displays orders by status sections
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (All major workflows functional, minor observation about order success redirect timing)
